name: matchup_opponent_type combined with year_offset
description: Crosses the inline matchup branch (matchup_opponent_type) with year_offset behavior on a team-stats-from-plays column. Coverage gap (d).
expected_query: with "current_week_opponents" as (select "h" as "nfl_team", "v" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "season_year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "season_type" = 'PRE' union select "v" as "nfl_team", "h" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "season_year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "season_type" = 'PRE'), "tb0ca2a4aebf3229e6a3550e3aacc0747" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "tb0ca2a4aebf3229e6a3550e3aacc0747_team_stats" as materialized (select "tb0ca2a4aebf3229e6a3550e3aacc0747"."nfl_team", sum(tb0ca2a4aebf3229e6a3550e3aacc0747.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "tb0ca2a4aebf3229e6a3550e3aacc0747" group by "tb0ca2a4aebf3229e6a3550e3aacc0747"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(tb0ca2a4aebf3229e6a3550e3aacc0747_team_stats.team_pass_yds_from_plays) FROM tb0ca2a4aebf3229e6a3550e3aacc0747_team_stats WHERE tb0ca2a4aebf3229e6a3550e3aacc0747_team_stats.nfl_team = current_week_opponents.opponent) AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "current_week_opponents" on "player"."current_nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."nfl_team" group by "current_week_opponents"."opponent", player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
